title: Vera Bradley Inc Financial Overview
text: Fintel provides financial data and analysis for Vera Bradley Inc. Key metrics show significant deterioration in profitability with negative earnings in recent fiscal periods. Revenue trends show declining consolidated revenues year-over-year across recent quarters. Gross margin expansion in some periods offset by increased promotional activity and SG&A pressures. The company maintains a debt-free balance sheet which provides financial flexibility during turnaround efforts. Inventory management remains a key focus area.
